key_moments.description: Officer notices a faint, strange odor at the carport but dismisses it.
key_moments.transcript_excerpt: Coming from the carport, a faint strange odor drifts through the space.

key_moments.description: Grandson's timeline (4 months) contradicts friend's timeline (2 months).
key_moments.transcript_excerpt: It now sounds like Craig hasn't been missing for 2 months as previously believed... Instead, he hasn't been seen for over 4 months.

key_moments.description: Dena's story about Mexico contradicts neighbor's report of separation.
key_moments.transcript_excerpt: clarifying that her husband is actually in Mexico with another woman... different from what her neighbor reported.

key_moments.description: Ex-husband claims Dena threatened to kill Craig.
key_moments.transcript_excerpt: she did state in front of me and my wife, if I could kill Craig and get away with it, I'd do it.

key_moments.description: Dena claims she cannot access the safe containing $1.5 million.
key_moments.transcript_excerpt: Craig keeps all our money in cash. I can't get in the safe

key_moments.description: Deputy Roger stands over the spot where the body was hidden.
key_moments.transcript_excerpt: he has no idea that he is standing in the very spot where Craig's body remained for days

content_pitch: A routine welfare check spirals into a complex homicide investigation when a wife's bizarre Mexico alibi clashes with family members' claims of violent threats. The narrative hinges on a critical reveal: a deputy unknowingly stands directly over the hidden body while interviewing the suspect, who simultaneously claims she cannot access a safe holding $1.5 million. With a fractured family, a missing husband, and a seasoned detective's intuition, this case delivers a tightly wound cold_open structure that perfectly matches our highest-performing winner patterns.
